name: Zucchini Italian Style
recipeIngredient: 6 small zucchini or yellow squash or combination, (about 1 1/2 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the unpeeled squash in half crosswise, then lengthwise into fourths.
2. Place the salt and squash slices in a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
3. Sprinkle with salad dressing and herb seasoning.
4. Cover tightly and microwave on high (100%) for 3 minutes.
5. Stir, then cover and microwave until tender, 2 to 3 more minutes.
6. Sprinkle with grated parmesan cheese if desired.
